---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for MCP-Law
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem. E.g., "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Describe the Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

- New jurisdiction: [if requesting a jurisdiction, specify code and legal system]
- New template type: [if requesting a template, describe the use case]
- New clause type: [if requesting a contract clause, describe the pattern]

## Examples

If applicable, provide examples of how this would be used.
